subject: AWS
object: AI Agents On Partner Central To Simplify Funding, Co-Sell And Admin Time For Channel Partners
source_quote: AWS Launches AI Agents On Partner Central To Simplify Funding, Co-Sell And Admin Time For Channel Partners

subject: AWS
object: AI Agents On Partner Central To Simplify Funding, Co-Sell And Admin Time For Channel Partners
source_quote: ‘We have these agents that are trained by AWS to recommend funding opportunities, identify deals that need more attention, flag deadlines and sales opportunities, sort through the documentation and automate a bunch of other time-consuming and somewhat tedious tasks,’ says AWS’ Julia Chen, vice president of Partner Core.

subject: AWS
object: AI Agents On Partner Central To Simplify Funding, Co-Sell And Admin Time For Channel Partners
source_quote: AWS partners can now leverage AI agents to speed up their funding eligibility, administration efficiency and to better guide actions across co-selling opportunities via new agentic AI innovation inside AWS’ revamped Partner Central hub.

subject: AWS
object: AI Agents On Partner Central To Simplify Funding, Co-Sell And Admin Time For Channel Partners
source_quote: “We have these agents that are trained by AWS to recommend funding opportunities, identify deals that need more attention, flag deadlines and sales opportunities, sort through the documentation and automate a bunch of other time-consuming and somewhat tedious tasks,” Julia Chen, vice president of Partner Core at AWS, told CRN.

subject: SambaNova
object: Its AI Platform in AWS Marketplace
source_quote: SambaNova Launches Its AI Platform in AWS Marketplace

subject: SambaNova
object: Its AI Platform in AWS Marketplace
source_quote: Leverage SambaNova’s inference performance — fast and efficiently, running open source models like Llama 4 Maverick and DeepSeek R1 671B.

subject: SambaNova
object: Its AI Platform in AWS Marketplace
source_quote: “With the SambaNova platform running in AWS Marketplace, organizations gain access to secure, high-speed inference from the largest open-source models. Solutions like this will help businesses move from experimentation to full production with AI,” said Michele Rosen, Research Manager, Open GenAI, LLMs, and the Evolving Open Source, IDC.

subject: SambaNova
object: Its AI Platform in AWS Marketplace
source_quote: Organizations can now seamlessly purchase and deploy SambaNova’s fast inference services alongside their existing infrastructure in AWS.

subject: 月之暗面
object: Kimi K2.7 Code每个token价格比GPT-5.5和Claude低12倍
source_quote: Moonshot AI has released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source model designed specifically for complex programming tasks and agent-based workflows.

subject: 月之暗面
object: Kimi K2.7 Code每个token价格比GPT-5.5和Claude低12倍
source_quote: Moonshot AI has released Kimi K2.7 Code, a new AI model built specifically for programming tasks and agent-based coding workflows. The model builds on its predecessor, Kimi K2.6, and is available as an open-weights version on Hugging Face.

subject: Hark
object: $700M Series A for its secretive 'universal' AI interface
source_quote: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface

subject: Hark
object: $700M Series A for its secretive 'universal' AI interface
source_quote: At least according to Hark, an AI lab building models and hardware for an AI personal assistant, which said on Thursday that it had raised that much in a Series A round that values it at $6 billion post-money.

subject: Hark
object: $700M Series A for its secretive 'universal' AI interface
source_quote: Perhaps what’s most notable about the fundraise is how little Hark has revealed about what it is building . Founder and CEO, Brett Adcock, also the entrepreneur behind robotics company Figure.AI and electric aircraft builder Archer, launched Hark in late 2025 with $100 million of his own money to develop an agentic AI system that serves as a universal interface with the digital world.

subject: Hark
object: $700M Series A for its secretive 'universal' AI interface
source_quote: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

subject: 谷歌
object: 搜索智能体功能，可主动帮你盯全网信息
source_quote: 继在 2026 年谷歌开发者大会上首次预告后，谷歌现已正式在 AI 模式中推出搜索智能体功能。

subject: 谷歌
object: 搜索智能体功能，可主动帮你盯全网信息
source_quote: 谷歌此前已推出多款自动化工具，比如标准版 Gemini 应用的定时任务、Gemini Spark 的定期检索功能，但这类工具大多按照固定周期运行，频率通常为每日一次或每 15 分钟一次。

subject: 华为
object: DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具
source_quote: 华为发布 DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具，支持代码编写、编译构建、设备运行等能力 - IT之家

subject: 华为
object: DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具
source_quote: 华为发布 DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具，支持代码编写、编译构建、设备运行等能力

subject: 华为
object: DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 13 日消息，华为在 HDC 2026 期间发布了 DevEco Code ，这是一款面向 HarmonyOS 开发场景的 AI Agent 工具，支持代码编写、编译构建、设备运行、文档查阅、运行时调试及 ArkTS 问题修复等能力。

subject: 华为
object: DevEco Code 鸿蒙开发 AI Agent 工具
source_quote: 据介绍，DevEco Code 基于开源项目 OpenCode 扩展开发，保留了 OpenCode 的终端交互、配置体系、 Provider / MCP / Skill / Plugin 等能力，并针对 HarmonyOS 工程增加了 DevEco Studio、Hvigor、HDC、Skill、HarmonyOS 知识库、ArkTS 检查和设备调试相关集成。

subject: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI
object: 辞职
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 13 日消息，据 Business Insider 周四报道，谷歌 Android 平台安全负责人、Android 安全高级工程师 René Mayrhofer 已从公司离职，原因是其反对谷歌与美国国防相关项目的合作以及公司在 AI 领域的战略方向变化。
